home.heroDescription: Your local Agromart group center has everything your farm needs to grow the best crops throughout the season. Many of our centers also stock popular farming supplies, including plastics, ropes, animal feed, and other general merchandise.
home.testimonialsSubtitle: Trusted by buyers for premium quality, freshness, and reliable service. We are committed to delivering the finest produce straight from the farm to your table..

products.potatoesDesc: Naturally grown, nutrient-rich potatoes for the best taste.
products.eggplantDesc: Fresh eggplants supplied directly from the farm with consistent quality and freshness.
products.tomatoDesc: Naturally grown, nutrient-rich juicy tomatoes perfect for daily cooking.
products.pointedGourdDesc: Naturally grown, nutrient-rich pointed gourds for healthy and delicious meals.
products.okraDesc: Fresh, high-quality okra cultivated using modern farming methods to ensure excellent yield and great taste.
products.bitterGourdDesc: Naturally grown, nutrient-rich bitter gourd known for its health benefits and unique taste.

user1.name: Max Collins
user1.review: I buy fresh vegetables from here regularly. The product quality is amazing and the delivery was very fast. It feels great to support farmers directly.

user2.name: Collins Maxwell
user2.review: The freshness of the vegetables is truly commendable. Getting products straight from the farm is a much better experience than buying from the market. I highly recommend it to everyone.

user3.name: Mr. Lins
user3.review: The ordering process was very simple and clear. The vegetables were perfectly fresh, and they felt naturally grown without any artificial chemicals.

user4.name: Max Collins
user4.review: Got the best quality products at a very affordable price. Since there are no middlemen, farmers get the right price and we get fresh items at a fair rate.

user5.name: Max Collins
user5.review: The packaging and customer service were excellent. The quality of the bitter gourd and eggplants was much better than the local market. Will definitely order again.

user6.name: Max Collins
user6.review: This initiative to get farm-fresh products directly on a digital platform is extraordinary. The tomatoes were completely juicy and fresh. Extremely satisfied!

user7.name: Max Collins
user7.review: The quality of potatoes and pointed gourds was excellent. These kinds of chemical-free, fresh vegetables are essential for family health. Thank you!

user8.name: Max Collins
user8.review: Easy payment and quick delivery system. Most importantly, the freshness of the farm reaches right to our home. It saves us both time and money.

videoSection.headingLine2: Take a Look at a Glance
videoSection.subheading: We collect chemical-free and fresh produce directly from the field, carefully sort and package it, so that it reaches your doorstep exactly on time.

slider.description: Our platform directly provides farmers with high-quality fertilizers, crop protection, efficient application methods for fertilizers and pesticides, premium quality seeds, and other essential agricultural services.

slide1.title: Your Trusted Partner in Crop Production

aboutSlider.description: The Agromart Group provides agricultural producers and farmers across Eastern Canada with fertilizer, crop protection, custom application, seed products, and other related services.

slide1.title: Your Trusted Partner in Crop Production

productSlider.description: The Agromart Group provides agricultural producers and farmers across Eastern Canada with fertilizer, crop protection, custom application, seed products, and other related services.

slide1.title: Your Trusted Partner in Crop Production

aboutPage.whoWeAreDesc: We are your trusted partner in crop production. The Agromart Group understands well that farming is not just a business; it is a way of life. You farm because you love taking care of your crops from the planting season all the way to harvest. You cannot imagine doing anything else. At Agromart Group, we deeply understand and value your passion and hard work.
aboutPage.ourMissionDesc: We are your trusted partner in crop production. The Agromart Group believes that agriculture is not just a livelihood, it is the economic backbone of the country. Our main mission is to stand by farmers at every stage, from the beginning of cultivation to bringing the harvest home.
aboutPage.farmersHeaderDesc: Trusted by buyers for quality, freshness, and reliable service. We work relentlessly to deliver the best products directly from the field to your table.

farmer1.name: Karim Mia
farmer1.content: "This method of delivering our produce directly to buyers is extraordinary. It allows us to get the right price for our crops, and buyers get fresh vegetables too."

farmer2.name: Rahmat Ali
farmer2.content: "We farmers are extremely happy to have the opportunity to do business directly without any middlemen. Providing chemical-free fresh vegetables to everyone's home is our goal."

farmer3.name: Abdul Kuddus
farmer3.content: "Agromart has truly valued our hard work. Now we can confidently focus on growing better quality and chemical-free crops."

farmer4.name: Sofuron Nesa
farmer4.content: "As a woman entrepreneur, being able to sell my farm's produce directly is a massive achievement for me. I am delighted with the wonderful response from buyers."

farmer5.name: Bilal Hossain
farmer5.content: "Fresh harvest from the field goes straight to the buyer's kitchen without any hassle. This modern farming and marketing system has changed our lives."

farmer6.name: Samsul Haque
farmer6.content: "We grow every crop completely naturally and with utmost care. Through this platform, buyers are guaranteed 100% authentic and fresh products."

singleProduct.title: Product Details
singleProduct.smallDescription: Explore full specifications, pricing information, and exclusive offers available for this item. Add it to your cart or buy now to enjoy premium delivery services.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions or need assistance? Drop us a message and our team will get back to you shortly.

faqSection.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqSection.q1: How long does it take to process my order?
faqSection.a1: Orders are normally processed within 24 to 48 working hours depending on inventory availability.
faqSection.q2: Do you provide tracking details for bulk shipments?
faqSection.a2: Yes, live tracking info is transmitted via SMS and registered email as soon as the logistics carrier picks up the shipment.
faqSection.q3: Can I modify my delivery location post dispatch?
faqSection.a3: Location modifications can only be requested prior to dispatch. Please contact your dedicated account manager for real-time adjustments.
